description: Design System compartido de MD Consultoría TI para CuentosIA, Palabras Vivas, dashboards y landing pages

stack.components: shadcn/ui (20) + custom (17) + layout (2) + dashboard (8) + landing (5) + responsive (5) + video (10) + docs-kit (8) + template-iphone (12) + template-zentry (10) + template-macbook (6) + template-saas (7) + template-ecommerce (6)
stack.video: Remotion v4.0.440 (10 compositions ALL working + 9 editor-pro-max components + 12 transitions + 5 presets)

knownIssues.description: Node 25 causa SyntaxError en Next.js 15 builds. Usar Node 22 LTS.
Tailwind v4 @theme inline no funciona en CSS importado por layouts. @layer utilities pierde especificidad vs globals.css.
knownIssues.workaround: Usar clases CSS explícitas fuera de @layer, scoped bajo .template-name.

knownIssues.description: globals.css h1-h6 font-size vars override Tailwind utilities.
knownIssues.workaround: Usar p tags o CSS layers para headings que necesiten Tailwind sizing.

knownIssues.description: 4 composiciones (InfographicZoom, PitchDeck, SocialClip, AudiogramVideo) reescritas con editor-pro-max components. Pending visual smoke test.
knownIssues.workaround: Run npx remotion render [CompositionId] to verify visual output

knownIssues.description: notebooklm login debe ejecutarse desde terminal real, no via ! en Claude Code (necesita ENTER interactivo).
knownIssues.workaround: Usuario corre notebooklm login desde su terminal directamente.

slideStyles.studio: DEFAULT — dark premium, device mockups, glass morphism
slideStyles.orange: white bg, blood orange accent, creative agency
slideStyles.neon: warm gray bg, neon yellow, blueprint annotations

nextSteps: Visual smoke test: render 4 rewritten compositions and verify output quality
